lesson.menu_desc: Morning to Night — adverbs of frequency — 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 — My Daily Routine: Morning to Night
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 3 — My Daily Routine

listenings.text: Good morning! It is Ana again. My mornings are simple. I always wake up at six. I usually walk in the park before breakfast. Then I have coffee and toast, and I read the news. I never check my phone before breakfast. It is my golden rule. At eight thirty, I start work. I love my calm mornings.

Hello! Carlos here. My evenings are my favorite time. I usually finish work at six. Then I often cook dinner with my mother. She is the real chef! After dinner, we sometimes watch a movie. I rarely go out at night. At eleven, I go to sleep. A simple evening, a happy life.

extra_audio.text: I wake up at seven. I have breakfast with coffee and fruit. I start work at eight. I have lunch at one. I always sleep early, at ten thirty.
